traits.summary: Choose one giant ancestry that grants a special power.
traits.description: Choose one ancestry: Stone (Endure the Cold: Resistance to Cold damage), Cloud (Indomitable Strength: add your Proficiency Bonus to a Strength check), Fire (Blazing Revival: when reduced to 0 Hit Points but not killed outright, drop to 1 Hit Point instead and shed bright light for 1 round; once per Long Rest), Frost (Frost's Chill: when you hit with an attack, deal an extra 1d6 Cold damage), Hill (Hill's Tumble: when a creature misses you with an attack, you can use your Reaction to force it to fall Prone), Storm (Storm's Thunder: when hit by an attack, deal Thunder damage equal to your Proficiency Bonus to the attacker; once per Long Rest).

traits.summary: Once per Long Rest, become Large for 10 minutes.
traits.description: As a Bonus Action, you become Large for 10 minutes, provided you have room to grow. Once you use this trait, you can't use it again until you finish a Long Rest.

traits.summary: You count as one size larger for carrying, pushing, and pulling.
traits.description: You count as one size larger when determining your carrying capacity and the weight you can push, drag, or lift.

flavorText: Goliaths are hardy descendants of giant lineages, known for endurance and bold physical presence. Their communities often value achievement, survival skill, and personal honor. Many seek worthy challenges to test the strength of body and will.
roleplayNotes: Choose what 'strength' means for your character—protection, discipline, reputation, or ambition.
